flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at New Jersey City University fell 28% between 2021 and 2024 (5.1k → 3.7k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 26% at New Jersey City University vs the 2018–2022 baseline (4.1k vs 5.5k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at New Jersey City University fell 13% between 2021 and 2024 (39.0% → 33.9%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at New Jersey City University fell 12% between 2021 and 2024 (73.6% → 64.8%).
